name: MICROCHIP TECHNOLOGY INC
summary: Microchip Technology Incorporated designs, develops, manufactures, and sells semiconductor products including microcontrollers, mixed-signal, analog, and Flash-IP integrated circuits. The company serves original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) across various industries. It offers products such as EEPROM, EERAM, SRAM, FPGA, RF, and SiC-based solutions, supported by embedded solutions engineers (ESEs) and client engagement managers (CEMs).

products.name: Microcontrollers
products.description: Embedded control integrated circuits for a wide range of OEM applications.

products.name: EEPROM
products.description: Electrically erasable programmable read only memory products.

products.name: EERAM
products.description: Electrically erasable random access memory solutions.

products.name: SRAM
products.description: Static random access memory semiconductor products.

products.name: Mixed-Signal/Analog ICs
products.description: Mixed-signal and analog integrated circuits for various applications.

partnerships.description: Administrative agent for the Amended and Restated Credit Agreement and Senior Credit Facilities.
